# opnsense_kea_ctrl_agent (Resource)

Manages the Kea DHCP control agent settings on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable the Kea control agent (required for HA and the dashboard).
- `http_host` (String) Address the control agent listens on.
- `http_port` (String) Port the control agent listens on.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
